hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
    sensitive = ['/execution/', '/config/', '/admin/']
    if any(p in path for p in sensitive):
        print('SECURITY AUDITOR: Sensitive path modified (' + path + '). Run /security-review before completing this task.')
except Exception:
    pass
"

bash -c 'changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null); py=$(echo "$changed" | grep -c "\.py$" || true); if [ "$py" -gt 0 ]; then echo "AGENT TEAM CHECKLIST:"; echo "  Reviewer: run /code-review:code-review (code was written this session)"; echo "  Completionist: run /superpowers:verification-before-completion before declaring done"; fi'
